params.name: Classic of Poetry
params.description: A foundational Confucian classic with 305 poems from Zhou-era China. Divided into Feng (folk songs), Ya (court odes), and Song (ritual hymns). It pioneered poetic devices like "fu, bi, xing" and emphasized emotional nuance. Praised by Confucius, it influenced East Asian literature for over two millennia.
